gltfFallback.name: glTF/KHR_gaussian_splatting fallback
gltfFallback.notes: Stores preview/fallback splats or mesh, not the full AURA contract.

native: .aura package preserves carrier registry, ray-query data, confidence maps, chunks, and residual metadata.

usdBridge.name: OpenUSD bridge
usdBridge.notes: Carries scene graph, geometry proxies, materials, and metadata; runtime ray-query data remains native AURA.
